translations.en: Today my mother is cooking soup.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, ma mère fait de la soupe.
translations.it: Oggi mia madre prepara la zuppa.
translations.pt: Hoje minha mãe está fazendo sopa.
translations.vi: Hôm nay mẹ tôi nấu súp.
translations.hi: आज मेरी माँ सूप बना रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η μητέρα μου μαγειρεύει σούπα.
translations.nb: I dag lager mammaen min suppe.
translations.id: Hari ini ibu saya memasak sup.
translations.da: I dag laver min mor suppe.
translations.ja: 今日は母がスープを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame of the clause; occupies the initial position in a V2 sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; appears in the V2 position.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Mutter'; agrees in gender (fem.), number (sg.), and case (nominative) with the subject.
Common noun serving as the subject (nominative) of the sentence.
Common noun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of 'kocht'.

sentences.target: Ich rufe meine Mutter später an.

translations.de: Ich rufe meine Mutter später an.
translations.en: I will call my mother later.
translations.es: Voy a llamar a mi madre más tarde.
translations.fr: Je vais appeler ma mère plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我待会儿给我妈妈打电话。
translations.pt: Vou ligar para minha mãe mais tarde.
translations.he: אני אתקשר לאמא שלי אחר כך.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ gọi cho mẹ sau.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में अपनी माँ को फोन करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα τηλεφωνήσω στη μητέρα μου αργότερα.
translations.ro: O să o sun pe mama mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til min mor senere.
translations.ja: あとで母に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular; lexical verb of the separable compound 'anrufen', with its particle separated to clause-final.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Mutter'; agrees in gender (fem.), number (sg.), and case (accusative) with the object.

Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; indicates the time of the action.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'anrufen'; placed at the end of the clause in main-clause word order.

sentences.target: Seine Mutter kommt gleich nach Hause.

translations.de: Seine Mutter kommt gleich nach Hause.
translations.en: His mother is coming home soon.
translations.es: Su madre llega pronto a casa.
translations.fr: Sa mère rentre bientôt à la maison.
translations.it: Sua madre torna presto a casa.
translations.pt: A mãe dele chega em casa logo.
translations.vi: Mẹ của anh ấy sắp về nhà.
translations.hi: उसकी माँ जल्द ही घर आ रही है.
translations.pl: Jego mama zaraz wróci do domu.
translations.el: Η μητέρα του θα γυρίσει σε λίγο στο σπίτι.
translations.ro: Mama lui vine acasă în curând.
translations.ja: 彼のお母さんはもうすぐ家に帰ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Mutter'; agrees in gender (fem.), number (sg.), and case (nominative) with the subject.
Common noun serving as the subject (nominative) of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Adverb meaning 'soon/right away'; modifies the verb 'kommt'.
Preposition governing dative; here part of the fixed expression 'nach Hause' meaning 'to home'.
Noun in dative singular in the set phrase 'nach Hause'; complement of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Meine Mutter hilft mir mit den Hausaufgaben.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːn ˈhaʊ̯sʔaʊ̯fˌɡaːbən/

translations.de: Meine Mutter hilft mir mit den Hausaufgaben.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈmʊtɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːn ˈhaʊ̯sʔaʊ̯fˌɡaːbən/
translations.en: My mother helps me with my homework.
translations.es: Mi madre me ayuda con la tarea.
translations.fr: Ma mère m'aide avec mes devoirs.
translations.it: Mia madre mi aiuta con i compiti.
translations.ru: Моя мама помогает мне с домашним заданием.
translations.pt: Minha mãe me ajuda com a lição de casa.
translations.he: אמא שלי עוזרת לי בשיעורי הבית.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi giúp tôi làm bài tập về nhà.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder helpt me met mijn huiswerk.
translations.uk: Моя мама допомагає мені з домашнім завданням.
translations.hu: Anyám segít nekem a házi feladatban.
translations.hi: मेरी माँ मेरे होमवर्क में मेरी मदद करती है.
translations.pl: Moja mama pomaga mi odrabiać lekcje.
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου με βοηθά με τα μαθήματά μου.
translations.nb: Mammaen min hjelper meg med leksene.
translations.id: Ibu saya membantu saya dengan pekerjaan rumah.
translations.sv: Min mamma hjälper mig med läxorna.
translations.ro: Mama mea mă ajută cu temele.
translations.cs: Moje maminka mi pomáhá s domácími úkoly.
translations.da: Min mor hjælper mig med lektierne.
translations.ja: 母は私の宿題を手伝ってくれます。
